info.title: Edge Assessment Connector Callback
info.description: This is the callback endpoint for assessments implemented by Cornerstone.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: the callback request to make to Cornerstone when updating/completing an assessment

IsPass.description: Indicates if the candidate passed the assessment.

Score.description: Indicates the assessment score for the candidate. Must be a non-negative integer value.

Result.description: this is an enum that gets mapped, accepted values are | "Pass" "Fail" "Needs Review"

DetailsUrl.description: Contains the URL to detailed report that a recruiter can launch from Cornerstone to view additional information about the assessment result.

Comments.description: Use this field to display additional details about the candidate's assessment results in Cornerstone.

Score.description: Indicates the assessment score for the candidate. Must be a non-negative integer value.

Result.description: this is an enum that gets mapped, accepted values are | "Pass" "Fail" "Needs Review"

Details.description: Use this field to display additional details about the candidate's assessment results in Cornerstone.

Description.description: Use this field to display the title of the category scored.
